PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'CHANGED_FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$CHANGED_FILE" == *.gd ]]; then if [[ -z "$GODOT_PATH" ]]; then echo "[hook] GODOT_PATH 미설정 — docs/SETUP.md 참고" 1>&2; exit 0; fi; "$GODOT_PATH" --headless --path . -e --quit 2>&1 || true; fi'
PostToolUse.description: GDScript 파일 수정 시 프로젝트 자동 검증 ($GODOT_PATH 사용)

hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
